nucleus.name: Nucleus
nucleus.slogan: Full-stack platform for API integration management, proxy and monitoring.
nucleus.description: Centralizes external API integrations behind a smart gateway/proxy with real-time observability, automatic authentication and end-to-end access control.

hero.title: Centralize, observe and secure
hero.subtitle: Full-stack platform that acts as a smart gateway and proxy for your external API integrations — with real-time observability, automatic authentication and end-to-end access control.

about.title: A single control point for every integration

what.title: What is Nucleus?
what.description: Full-stack platform that combines gateway, proxy and observability into a single tool. Centralizes access to external APIs, applies authentication automatically and exposes metrics, logs and diagnostics in real time.

who.title: Who it's for
who.description: Companies that depend on multiple external API integrations and need a single place to manage credentials, observe behavior and diagnose failures quickly.

problem.title: The problem it solves
problem.description: Removes credentials scattered across code, lack of visibility into integration traffic and difficulty diagnosing incidents. Everything goes through an auditable proxy with centralized logs and metrics.

features.title: Everything your API operation needs
features.subtitle: From endpoint registration to production diagnostics — every layer of Nucleus is built to give the team autonomy and the operation security.

registration.title: Integration and endpoint registry
registration.description: Catalog every external API in one place, with versioning, per-environment configuration and standardized metadata.

proxy.title: Reverse proxy with automatic authentication
proxy.description: Nucleus injects credentials and tokens into calls at runtime, freeing clients from authentication logic and secret handling.

monitoring.title: Uptime and health monitoring
monitoring.description: Track each integration's availability and response time in real time, with alerts before the problem reaches your customers.

logs.title: Detailed request logging
logs.description: Every call generates an auditable record with payload, headers, status and response time — ready for investigation and compliance.

panel.title: Web panel for management and diagnosis
panel.description: Single interface to configure integrations, inspect logs and visualize metrics, without server access.

accessControl.title: JWT-based access control
accessControl.description: JWT authentication with profiles and granular permissions — every user accesses only what they need.

licensing.title: Per-instance licensing
licensing.description: License system that controls usage per instance and protects distribution in corporate environments.

fullStack.title: Integrated full-stack architecture
fullStack.description: React + TypeScript on the front and Java 21 + Spring Boot on the back — one cohesive product, owned by one team.

observability.title: Complete observability
observability.description: Metrics, logs and diagnosis in a single platform, with no dependency on external tools.

security.title: Robust security
security.description: JWT, profile-based access control, license management and environment-driven config across every layer.

scalability.title: Scalable to many integrations
scalability.description: Supports the integration catalog growing without losing performance or operational clarity.

centralization.title: Centralized external APIs
centralization.description: A single configuration and governance point for everything your application consumes from the outside world.

security.title: Protection across every layer
security.subtitle: When integration traffic flows through Nucleus, security isn't optional. The platform is engineered with defense in depth, from login to logging.

jwt.title: JWT authentication
jwt.description: Signed tokens with controlled expiration and refresh — no cookie sessions and easy SSO integration.

rbac.title: Profile-based access control
rbac.description: Granular permissions per endpoint and action, aligned with your organization's responsibility model.

routes.title: Route protection
routes.description: Every route is validated by backend middleware and frontend guards — no unprotected path.

licenses.title: License management
licenses.description: Per-instance licensing prevents off-contract usage and gives visibility into consumption in corporate environments.

env.title: Environment variable configuration
env.description: Secrets and sensitive endpoints stay out of the code — everything via environment, with simple, auditable rotation.

tech.title: Built on a modern, robust stack
tech.subtitle: React 19 + TypeScript on the front, Java 21 + Spring Boot on the back and Docker on the infrastructure — choices made for performance, maintainability and team velocity.

cta.title: Ready to centralize your integrations?
cta.subtitle: Bring your external APIs out of the shadows with a single platform to configure, observe and protect every flow.

cnab240.name: Mapper240
cnab240.slogan: Desktop app for CNAB240 and Excel spreadsheets.
cnab240.description: Native desktop application that processes CNAB240 files and related Excel spreadsheets — with a robust batch pipeline based on Spring Batch, ready for the routine of companies that operate with Brazilian banks.

hero.title: Desktop processing of
hero.subtitle: Native desktop application that automates reading, validation and batch processing of CNAB240 files — with built-in support for Excel spreadsheets via Apache POI and ready-to-install builds for Windows and Linux.

about.title: CNAB240, frictionless and right on the desktop

what.title: What is CNAB240?
what.description: CNAB240 is the FEBRABAN standard for file exchange between companies and financial institutions — used in collections, payments, direct debits and transfers. Each line is 240 characters long and follows a per-bank layout.

who.title: Who is it for
who.description: Companies, cooperatives and financial operations that need to process large volumes of remittance and return files plus related Excel spreadsheets in their relationship with Brazilian banks.

problem.title: The problem it solves
problem.description: Replaces manual scripts and scattered spreadsheets with a native desktop app that centralizes the processing pipeline — fault tolerant, reprocessable and end-to-end auditable.

features.title: Everything your operation needs in a single app
features.subtitle: From file arrival to final export — every step of the CNAB240 and Excel flow designed to be fast, reliable and auditable.

upload.title: CNAB240 + Excel ingestion
upload.description: Reads CNAB240 files and Excel spreadsheets via Apache POI, validating the content before processing starts.

largeFiles.title: Scalable batch processing
largeFiles.description: Spring Batch pipeline — streamed reading, chunk control and progress feedback for high volumes.

metadata.title: Metadata extraction
metadata.description: Identifies batches, records, totals and operation types straight from the CNAB240 file or the Excel spreadsheet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard and visualization
dashboard.description: Desktop dashboard with KPIs, status and history to follow everything that is being processed.

reprocess.title: Reprocessing and fault tolerance
reprocess.description: Spring Batch listeners and skippers isolate errors and let you reprocess only what's needed without redoing the whole batch.

export.title: Export and notifications
export.description: Export records and reports in reconciliation-friendly formats, with email notifications when processing completes.

noLimit.title: No file size limit
noLimit.description: Spring Batch processes remittances of any volume without trimming or manual splits.

brazilianBanks.title: Brazilian banks compatible
brazilianBanks.description: Layouts tuned for the major banks across the Brazilian market.

performance.title: Native desktop application
performance.description: Shipped through native installers (MSI/AppImage) built with jpackage — no browser, no cloud.

modernUx.title: Modern UX
modernUx.description: React 19 + HeroUI + Tailwind front-end embedded via JCEF, with the fluidity of an SPA inside the desktop.

security.title: Trust and protection on every operation
security.subtitle: When financial movement is involved, security is non-negotiable. Mapper240 is designed with layers of protection across the app lifecycle.

license.title: License validation
license.description: License3j ensures that only authorized installations can run the application.

signing.title: GPG signing
signing.description: GPG key pairs protect the integrity of the license and the distributed artifacts.

localData.title: Local persistence with H2
localData.description: Data stays on the user's machine — nothing travels to external servers.

logging.title: Structured logs
logging.description: Logback with auditable formats for investigation and compliance.

distribution.title: Signed distribution
distribution.description: Installers built with jpackage carry vendor metadata and bundled icons.

tech.title: Built on a robust stack
tech.subtitle: Java 21 + Spring Boot on the backend, React 19 + Vite + Tailwind on the front, all embedded in a single desktop binary via JCEF.

compatibility.title: Ready for the Brazilian banking ecosystem and native installers

banks.title: Brazilian banks
banks.subtitle: CNAB240 layouts aligned with the FEBRABAN standard of the major banks used by Brazilian companies.

platforms.title: Native distribution
platforms.subtitle: Ready-to-install builds for the main corporate operating systems.
platforms.windowsDescription: MSI with start menu entry and per-user installation.
platforms.linuxDescription: Portable AppImage with no external dependencies.

cta.title: Ready to automate your CNAB240 processing?
cta.subtitle: Speed up your company's routine with a robust, secure and easy-to-install desktop app.

about.title: About Global Vortex
about.paragraph1: Global Vortex Solutions was born with the mission to transform ideas into intelligent and scalable digital solutions. We specialize in developing applications and IT services, offering high-performance technology for companies that want to evolve securely in the digital landscape.
about.paragraph2: Our biggest differentiator is Nucleus, an integration and monitoring platform for applications that connects systems, identifies failures in real-time, and elevates operational control of businesses. With an experienced team, we deliver personalized projects focused on results, innovation, and scalability.

features.title: Results Focused
features.description: Solutions aligned with your business objectives, with agility and efficiency.

features.title: Intelligent Integration
features.description: Nucleus connects your systems and monitors applications in real-time.

features.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
features.description: We apply modern methodologies to create robust and sustainable solutions.

features.title: Future Vision
features.description: We think about and develop solutions that grow alongside you.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need more information? Contact us today and our team will be happy to assist you.

footer.description: Empowering businesses to achieve global success through innovative solutions and strategic expertise.
